### REQUEST ###

```
{
  "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "2:LEN": "netprof/protocols/grpc.py",
  "3:LEN": "\"\"\"gRPC detection over HTTP/2: content-type application/grpc, :path, message framing.\"\"\"\r\n\r\nfrom __future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport struct\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http2\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.base import ProtocolHandler, ts_at_offset\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import (\r\n    FRAME_DATA,\r\n    FRAME_HEADERS,\r\n    HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE,\r\n    PREFACE_LEN,\r\n    _decode_header_block,\r\n    _parse_frames,\r\n)\r\n\r\nGRPC_CONTENT_TYPE = \"application/grpc\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_grpc_path(path: str) -> tuple[str | None, str | None]:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract service and method from :path like /package.Service/Method.\"\"\"\r\n    if not path or not path.startswith(\"/\"):\r\n        return (None, None)\r\n    path = path[1:]\r\n    if \"/\" not in path:\r\n        return (None, None)\r\n    service, method = path.rsplit(\"/\", 1)\r\n    return (service or None, method or None)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data: bytes) -> list[int]:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract message sizes from gRPC length-prefixed framing (1 byte compressed + 4 byte length).\"\"\"\r\n    sizes = []\r\n    offset = 0\r\n    while offset + 5 <= len(data):\r\n        _compressed = data[offset]\r\n        length = struct.unpack(\">I\", data[offset + 1 : offset + 5])[0]\r\n        sizes.append(length)\r\n        offset += 5 + length\r\n        if offset > len(data):\r\n            break\r\n    return sizes\r\n\r\n\r\nclass GrpcHandler(ProtocolHandler):\r\n    \"\"\"Detect gRPC over HTTP/2 and extract RPC identity and message sizes.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        return \"grpc\"\r\n\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        if c2s_bytes[:PREFACE_LEN] != HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE:\r\n            return False\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:], base_offset=PREFACE_LEN)\r\n        for _sid, ft, frame, _off in c2s_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE in ct:\r\n                    return True\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n        if not self.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n            return []\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:], base_offset=PREFACE_LEN)\r\n        s2c_frames = _parse_frames(s2c_bytes, base_offset=0)\r\n        request_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        response_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        bytes_c2s_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        bytes_s2c_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        message_sizes_by_stream: dict[int, list[int]] = {}\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in c2s_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE not in ct:\r\n                    continue\r\n                path = headers.get(\":path\") or headers.get(\"path\") or \"\"\r\n                service, method = _parse_grpc_path(path)\r\n                request_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                    \"offset\": offset,\r\n                    \"method\": headers.get(\":method\"),\r\n                    \"path\": path,\r\n                    \"authority\": headers.get(\":authority\"),\r\n                    \"service\": service,\r\n                    \"method\": method,\r\n                }\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                data = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                bytes_c2s_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + len(data)\r\n                sizes = _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data)\r\n                message_sizes_by_stream.setdefault(stream_id, []).extend(sizes)\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in s2c_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE not in ct:\r\n                    continue\r\n                path = headers.get(\":path\") or \"\"\r\n                service, method = _parse_grpc_path(path)\r\n                try:\r\n                    status_code = int(headers.get(\":status\") or headers.get(\"status\", \"0\"))\r\n                except ValueError:\r\n                    status_code = None\r\n                response_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                    \"offset\": offset,\r\n                    \"status_code\": status_code,\r\n                    \"service\": service,\r\n                    \"method\": method,\r\n                }\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                data = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                bytes_s2c_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + len(data)\r\n                sizes = _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data)\r\n                message_sizes_by_stream.setdefault(stream_id, []).extend(sizes)\r\n        transactions = []\r\n        for stream_id in sorted(set(request_by_stream) | set(response_by_stream)):\r\n            if stream_id == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            req = request_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            resp = response_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            service = req.get(\"service\") or resp.get(\"service\")\r\n            method = req.get(\"method\") or resp.get(\"method\")\r\n            req_offset = req.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            resp_offset = resp.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            request_ts = ts_at_offset(req_offset, c2s_ts_map)\r\n            response_ts = ts_at_offset(resp_offset, s2c_ts_map)\r\n            latency_ms = None\r\n            if request_ts is not None and response_ts is not None:\r\n                latency_ms = (response_ts - request_ts) * 1000.0\r\n            txn_id = compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id, stream_id)\r\n            transactions.append(\r\n                Transaction(\r\n                    txn_id=txn_id,\r\n                    flow_id=flow_id,\r\n                    protocol=\"grpc\",\r\n                    method=req.get(\"method\"),\r\n                    authority=req.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                    path=req.get(\"path\"),\r\n                    status_code=resp.get(\"status_code\"),\r\n                    stream_id=stream_id,\r\n                    request_ts=request_ts,\r\n                    response_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    end_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    latency_ms=latency_ms,\r\n                    request_bytes=bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    response_bytes=bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    grpc_service=service,\r\n                    grpc_method=method,\r\n                    message_sizes=message_sizes_by_stream.get(stream_id),\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n        return transactions\r\n",
  "4:VARINT": 4
}
```

__future__ import annotations\r\n\r\nimport struct\r\nfrom typing import Any\r\n\r\nfrom netprof.correlation import compute_txn_id_http2\r\nfrom netprof.models.transaction import Transaction\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.base import ProtocolHandler, ts_at_offset\r\nfrom netprof.protocols.http2 import (\r\n    FRAME_DATA,\r\n    FRAME_HEADERS,\r\n    HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE,\r\n    PREFACE_LEN,\r\n    _decode_header_block,\r\n    _parse_frames,\r\n)\r\n\r\nGRPC_CONTENT_TYPE = \"application/grpc\"\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_grpc_path(path: str) -> tuple[str | None, str | None]:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract service and method from :path like /package.Service/Method.\"\"\"\r\n    if not path or not path.startswith(\"/\"):\r\n        return (None, None)\r\n    path = path[1:]\r\n    if \"/\" not in path:\r\n        return (None, None)\r\n    service, method = path.rsplit(\"/\", 1)\r\n    return (service or None, method or None)\r\n\r\n\r\ndef _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data: bytes) -> list[int]:\r\n    \"\"\"Extract message sizes from gRPC length-prefixed framing (1 byte compressed + 4 byte length).\"\"\"\r\n    sizes = []\r\n    offset = 0\r\n    while offset + 5 <= len(data):\r\n        _compressed = data[offset]\r\n        length = struct.unpack(\">I\", data[offset + 1 : offset + 5])[0]\r\n        sizes.append(length)\r\n        offset += 5 + length\r\n        if offset > len(data):\r\n            break\r\n    return sizes\r\n\r\n\r\nclass GrpcHandler(ProtocolHandler):\r\n    \"\"\"Detect gRPC over HTTP/2 and extract RPC identity and message sizes.\"\"\"\r\n\r\n    @property\r\n    def name(self) -> str:\r\n        return \"grpc\"\r\n\r\n    def detect(self, c2s_bytes: bytes, s2c_bytes: bytes) -> bool:\r\n        if c2s_bytes[:PREFACE_LEN] != HTTP2_CLIENT_PREFACE:\r\n            return False\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:], base_offset=PREFACE_LEN)\r\n        for _sid, ft, frame, _off in c2s_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE in ct:\r\n                    return True\r\n        return False\r\n\r\n    def parse(\r\n        self,\r\n        c2s_bytes: bytes,\r\n        s2c_bytes: bytes,\r\n        flow_id: str,\r\n        c2s_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n        s2c_ts_map: list[tuple[int, float]],\r\n    ) -> list[Transaction]:\r\n        if not self.detect(c2s_bytes, s2c_bytes):\r\n            return []\r\n        c2s_frames = _parse_frames(c2s_bytes[PREFACE_LEN:], base_offset=PREFACE_LEN)\r\n        s2c_frames = _parse_frames(s2c_bytes, base_offset=0)\r\n        request_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        response_by_stream: dict[int, dict[str, Any]] = {}\r\n        bytes_c2s_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        bytes_s2c_by_stream: dict[int, int] = {}\r\n        message_sizes_by_stream: dict[int, list[int]] = {}\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in c2s_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE not in ct:\r\n                    continue\r\n                path = headers.get(\":path\") or headers.get(\"path\") or \"\"\r\n                service, method = _parse_grpc_path(path)\r\n                request_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                    \"offset\": offset,\r\n                    \"method\": headers.get(\":method\"),\r\n                    \"path\": path,\r\n                    \"authority\": headers.get(\":authority\"),\r\n                    \"service\": service,\r\n                    \"method\": method,\r\n                }\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                data = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                bytes_c2s_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + len(data)\r\n                sizes = _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data)\r\n                message_sizes_by_stream.setdefault(stream_id, []).extend(sizes)\r\n        for stream_id, ft, frame, offset in s2c_frames:\r\n            if ft == FRAME_HEADERS and stream_id != 0:\r\n                block = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                headers = _decode_header_block(block)\r\n                ct = (headers.get(\"content-type\") or \"\").lower()\r\n                if GRPC_CONTENT_TYPE not in ct:\r\n                    continue\r\n                path = headers.get(\":path\") or \"\"\r\n                service, method = _parse_grpc_path(path)\r\n                try:\r\n                    status_code = int(headers.get(\":status\") or headers.get(\"status\", \"0\"))\r\n                except ValueError:\r\n                    status_code = None\r\n                response_by_stream[stream_id] = {\r\n                    \"offset\": offset,\r\n                    \"status_code\": status_code,\r\n                    \"service\": service,\r\n                    \"method\": method,\r\n                }\r\n            elif ft == FRAME_DATA:\r\n                data = getattr(frame, \"data\", b\"\")\r\n                bytes_s2c_by_stream[stream_id] = bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0) + len(data)\r\n                sizes = _parse_grpc_message_sizes(data)\r\n                message_sizes_by_stream.setdefault(stream_id, []).extend(sizes)\r\n        transactions = []\r\n        for stream_id in sorted(set(request_by_stream) | set(response_by_stream)):\r\n            if stream_id == 0:\r\n                continue\r\n            req = request_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            resp = response_by_stream.get(stream_id, {})\r\n            service = req.get(\"service\") or resp.get(\"service\")\r\n            method = req.get(\"method\") or resp.get(\"method\")\r\n            req_offset = req.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            resp_offset = resp.get(\"offset\", 0)\r\n            request_ts = ts_at_offset(req_offset, c2s_ts_map)\r\n            response_ts = ts_at_offset(resp_offset, s2c_ts_map)\r\n            latency_ms = None\r\n            if request_ts is not None and response_ts is not None:\r\n                latency_ms = (response_ts - request_ts) * 1000.0\r\n            txn_id = compute_txn_id_http2(flow_id, stream_id)\r\n            transactions.append(\r\n                Transaction(\r\n                    txn_id=txn_id,\r\n                    flow_id=flow_id,\r\n                    protocol=\"grpc\",\r\n                    method=req.get(\"method\"),\r\n                    authority=req.get(\"authority\"),\r\n                    path=req.get(\"path\"),\r\n                    status_code=resp.get(\"status_code\"),\r\n                    stream_id=stream_id,\r\n                    request_ts=request_ts,\r\n                    response_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    end_ts=response_ts,\r\n                    latency_ms=latency_ms,\r\n                    request_bytes=bytes_c2s_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    response_bytes=bytes_s2c_by_stream.get(stream_id, 0),\r\n                    grpc_service=service,\r\n                    grpc_method=method,\r\n                    message_sizes=message_sizes_by_stream.get(stream_id),\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n        return transactions\r\n", "4:VARINT": 4}
